ground_truth.title: Home - Epic Games
ground_truth.main_content: Epic Games is a leading interactive entertainment company and provider of cutting-edge 3D engine technology. The company develops world-class games like Fortnite and the Unreal Engine game development platform. Epic Games operates the Epic Games Store, a digital storefront for PC games. The company provides game engine technology to developers worldwide. This homepage serves as the main entry point to Epic Games' products, services, and community.
with: We develop cutting-edge games and cross-platform game engine technology
Epic Games is a leading interactive entertainment company
The company provides game engine technology to developers worldwide
Epic Games operates the Epic Games Store for PC games
